name: notify-bus
description: Self-hostable multi-channel notification bus. GitHub webhooks in, Feishu (and more) out. Bun + Elysia + React.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green 'bun run --watch src/index.ts' 'bun --cwd web run dev'
scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun run build:server
scripts.build:server: echo 'Bun runs TS natively; no server build step needed.'
